headline: Bubbles McSqueaky Puts On One-Woman Show As A Sentient Soap Bubble, Floats Away
summary: The audience watched in silent awe as she drifted toward the ceiling fans.
fullBody: Bubbles McSqueaky, performance artist and self-described 'iridescent being,' staged a one-woman show as a sentient soap bubble. The performance involved her floating around the stage in a clear sphere before a draft carried her toward the ceiling fans. 'This is part of the art,' she squeaked before disappearing into the ventilation system. The audience gave a standing ovation to an empty stage. Bubbles has not been seen since.
